preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Figuring it all out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Taking five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Time out, time out, time out.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just hanging out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So we found out that there's a ritual happening soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, like super stat.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And there's no day or night here, so who cares, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right? It's all just night, all the time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's kind of a sunless gray sky. There's some low light, like a very heavy-- Like a very dark, thunderous Seattle.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Hello Seattle! It's a song.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What song?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I think it is.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Or not. Getting a glance at the one nearest to you, the bodies seem to be fairly well preserved for as long as they've been here, so you get the sense that there isn't a lot of heavy weather here at all. And given that fact, the decay that's there, it is reminiscent, maybe not quite as old as the corpse of Purvon when you discovered the tomb originally, but comparatively ancient. At least over 500 years.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm feeling Foresighty. Can I creep up behind and do the same?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I will say you can do that, however you still have disadvantage, because she's already taken the roll and you're supplementing her roll in a very short period of time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would that be an even roll, then, since I have advantage on everything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have advantage on everything. I'm giving you a chance to do this when normally you would have none, so the Foresight's allowing you to have a roll with disadvantage. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's going to fail. Ooh! 18.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You do. You're getting close to the tail end of it. You have about five minutes left.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Me. Please?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you throw the body behind you, the door's now being slammed a bit. It seems some of the undead wandered towards that illusion, some are still on the other side, and now that you've pulled the censer back from it, the other door's kind of (bangs) coming pushed in. You can see light peeking through. You guys rush out, still with your Seeming illusion on, and you hear, very loudly, almost omnipresent, the screech, the (shriek) of the gloom stalker, right around the corner from you, as it begins to take off just on the other side of the building.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we look for another building we can duck into? To lose their-- So they can't find us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we can just go hopping from building to building.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I want everyone to roll a stealth check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we still have...

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can see across, and it's not a straight shot, but you can get low and you can see where it breaks. Since you have a good sense of direction, being the ranger, I'd say you know it's at least under a mile.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I did.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You did?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, shards of blue crystal.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Matt's like, uh...

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, maybe it's useful in this case?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's not pretty, it's all broken.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One question is, if these stones are used to pull this tower into the main realms, is there another purpose to them here, or is that doorway safe, is what I'm wondering?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, that doorway is in no way safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where was the gem embedded in the doorway?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About eight feet up. About two feet above the doorway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel like we should go through the wall or over it, just on principle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can go over it. We do have a magic carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and all the flying creatures are going to see us immediately. We either go under the wall... How far from the wall to the tower is it? Does it seem?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Probably...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we see the tower through the doorway?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Each time the target takes damage. It has to take damage to get the save. So, it's under your control for an hour or until it takes damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (wheezing) You could have told it gently!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't speak Gloom!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Five points?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. You (wham) and almost knocks the wind out of you, and you slam into the hard ground, but the claws unfurl and leave you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (wheezing) I made it, guys! I'm glad you made it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Only 59 more minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Maybe he can tell the others to leave us alone!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, call them off!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Or maybe there are birds on the other side of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does he keep rerolling for breaking, or is that it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tell them it's handled, we're dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And then we can ride him!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ask him if he has any money, and ask him if he can make a good dinner because I'm hungry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where's the nearest 7-11?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys could take a short rest during that time, if you want to do a full scoping. By the time you come back, that spell's about to fade.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He had rations! No one takes rations!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He was handing out weapons.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It was like Carpentry of the Damned sort of thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What if the giant orb has to reach the crystals?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It might, but it might just do the (buzzing, exploding).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Technical terms.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the (buzzing, exploding).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's magic, it's the best I've got.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Who's going up?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me and Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just you two, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How's everybody doing right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm a little rough.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I could use 20 points.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I could use 20 points.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let's do a little Mass Cure Wounds situation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But do it with a flair! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, fudge.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What? Oh that's a one, not seven, isn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's fine, that's fine!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're taking a short rest; I can add my--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you guys taking a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, while they fly up, is it enough time for the people staying in the house to heal a bit?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys could take a short rest during that time, if you want to do a full scoping. By the time you come back, that spell's about to fade.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys could take a short rest during that time, if you want to do a full scoping. By the time you come back, that spell's about to fade.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, yeah, we're going to go as fast as we can.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You climb onto its back. Touching this creature is like touching the inside of a freezer. Even with gauntleted hands, you have to wrap some of your cloth around to not give yourself frostbite over a period of time. Even resting on it, especially with your leather armors, it chills you to the bone. As you take up, and even just ten, 15 minutes into (wings flapping) up into the air, gathering as to whether you'll be noticed or spotted by this, you can feel it beginning to chill you, your teeth are beginning to chatter from being in that proximity of the freezing cold creature. It's strange, as you touch it, it feels less like fur and flesh and more like you're grabbing onto a very, very thick sackcloth. Like, it tugs and pulls and it feels almost like the scruff of a cat or dog's neck, but it has a clothy texture, and as you grab it, you can feel the cold wisps of shadow and darkness obscure your hands. You feel like you're plunging your arms into it, but you find purchase within that shadow and hold on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What? Oh that's a one, not seven, isn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's fine, that's fine!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're taking a short rest; I can add my--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you guys taking a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, while they fly up, is it enough time for the people staying in the house to heal a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys could take a short rest during that time, if you want to do a full scoping. By the time you come back, that spell's about to fade.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, yeah, we're going to go as fast as we can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So those that are traveling can't take a short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And if that fades, he's fully aware that he was dominated, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well. You don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Especially me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you especially don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Time's a-wasting, Scanlan, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go. Mr. Mistoffelees!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you open the door, there, just landing (landing) (gloom stalker croaking). You guys climb onto its back?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we do!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You've been circling here for about 15 to 20 minutes or so, and the energy (explosion noise) untethers and unfurls. There's a shockwave of warmth that cascades outward from the top of the tower. Both of you feel it pass through you, and that freezing cold that you've been trying desperately to hold at bay as you're clutching onto the back of this gloom stalker, this heat wave moves past. The gloom stalker (squawks) instinctually pulls back, and you can see for a second it drops, and you feel your stomach bottom out as it loses about 20 feet of elevation before catching itself again. And you watch as any of the others that are currently cycling around the stratosphere over the city of Thar Amphala also are taken off guard by the sudden burst of energy. As you glance over, you can see the tethers that connect have all fallen and faded. (music changes)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Mother bitch.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can spend a little more time on it. It'll take a few days of getting that to happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I want you to explain every roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the rest you take, the Shadowfell does not seem to have any adverse effect on your presence.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: However...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's no "however." You complete your rest fine. You guys all gather your stuff, you take a breath and prepare for the next leg of your venture as the door to your building slams open, Scanlan and Vax arriving, just leaping off the back of the gloom stalker that they had under their control. Who is also about to lose its...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How much longer do they have?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fly away!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Attack the tower. Tell it to attack the tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Really? It's going to forget halfway there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can mess one person up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fly away! Just fly away!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: On the rest, could I have worked a little bit more on enchanting the silver bullets?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Seeming lasts for eight hours, so you're still under the guise of that illusion.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, focus it on one side of the tower. Both on the same side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Like a tree. Let's do this. This is a terrible plan. All right. LAURA Just trying to gauge Matt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know! Matt's stone cold!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Matt's thinking about all the other people he could be playing D&D with right now. (laughing)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's imagining a whole other set of faces here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's teleport inside that dragon. Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what's the plan, guys?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's the plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to get close enough so that they can do their 500 feet distance. But keep a distance to the tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And if we can be hidden while we're doing this, instead of being open. We have a 500-foot range here. We've got a dope-ass range.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth's got a cloak. Pike's got a cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm huge.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's huge.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to try to get in a building that's closer to the tower.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You notice, Vex... There's been no change in daylight or nightlight here. It's been this constant deep, dark gray gloom that hangs over the Shadowfell, unchanging, unshifting. There's a creeping brightness on the horizon that you feel rising.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like the Fourth of fucking July.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The aliens are coming and we're welcoming them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, they're not wrong.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys are holding hands, a voice begins to ring out. Omnipresent. Directionless, like it's being positioned directly into the minds of each of you from wherever it stands. It's an unfamiliar voice. The words creep and curl in, like they've always been resting, and now is the moment is for them to reveal themselves. "I would ask you to listen before you make a fool of yourselves. I've watched you since you stepped into my domain, and I'm not going to lie, it's been entertaining. I admire your gumption. It reminds me of others who have tried what you are trying. But they're dead now, so I leave the choice to you. You can either walk away, or you can join me, or you will die, and join me anyway."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's totally taken us to Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's okay, we can still kill everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're in the north. There's a lot of places that snow. It could be Draconia. There's a lot of places that snow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But it's Delilah Briarwood.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have no direct idea of where you are, but based on the weather that you left Whitestone in not too long ago, this isn't Whitestone or near Whitestone. The weather patterns are a little more classic snow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it winter in Wildemount right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's the tail end of winter in a few places.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tower still needs to come down.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go. Let's move. Let's attack. Are we within 500 feet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are about now within 500 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fucking get into the building that we can, and then start it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pike and I huddle together and try and join forces.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A full rest would have been maybe four or five hours ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matthew Mercer, may I borrow your Monster Manual so I know what I am?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Marisha actually has a page for it, if you want that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do have a page. Do you want my beholder page?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's terrible for me, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: My teeth hurt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: My teeth hurt?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's terrible. I'm not okay with that roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, give me that back page. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Back page.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't say what his initiative is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You have to roll. It's a dex modifier plus a d20 if you don't have initiative?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Your initiative is normal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your initiative is whatever the creature's initiative is, which is its dex modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Plus a d20.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: When was the last time we went to bed?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, it's a normal amount of time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I mean, like, right before coming? I can't remember the last time we had a full rest.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Scanlan? And Grog. You both take-- Actually no, since you have resistance to fire-- Which actually, your form is, I should give you the large form.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're a beholder, do you get legendary actions and resistances and shit?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think-- I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's legendary resistances, not actions.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What's a legendary resistance?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get to reroll-- Unless it doesn't have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This doesn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, the beholder does not. It's not that powerful. All right, I need Pike, Grog--it's a dexterity saving throw. So Grog and Scanlan automatically fail. Percival and Pike, I need you both to make dexterity saving throws, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Oh, fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (brightly) Six!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Oh, I thought that was ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have advantage also, against--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. You take a total of 35 points of fire and necrotic damage. You take 35 points of necrotic damage, and because you're resistant to fire, you only take 17 points of fire damage. 35 points.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Did you say 17, Matt?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17, yes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It lasts for seven days if she fails the saves. She has three saves in a row, and if she succeeds, it goes away. If she fails, it lasts for seven days.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) We'll fucking lead as two kings!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Tenacious D for the rest of this fight, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She now is affected by Mind Fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Her mind becomes feverish, and she has disadvantage on intelligence checks and intelligence saving throws, and she becomes confused.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What does that mean? What does confused mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For seven days.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It sounds like she can't cast spells too well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hopefully.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's now considered confused. She's under the effects of the Confusion spell for as long as it lasts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's me under the effects of being confused about the Confusion spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Does that end your turn, Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What do you have for a bonus?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't have a lot for a bonus. I can go into an elemental form.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If we attack her, is that going to drop the confusion?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, can we attack her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, it just lasts for seven days.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I'm sorry. It's now Delilah's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can he do that with concentration?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is not a concentration spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Magic can't put me to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He casts Power Word Kill.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Well, that's different.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where did Sleep go?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's just what he said.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He meant metaphorical. He meant death.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You utter a word of power that can compel one creature you see within range to die instantly. If the creature you chose has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies. How many hit points do you have?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm dead. Insta-full death?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Insta-full death.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No saving from it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Perma-death?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No death saving throws. You watch as the life suddenly fades from Vex's eyes, and she falls to the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vax is watching, frozen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, don't compliment the map, you guys. Matt really doesn't like it.
